page_header.label: PERSONAL TRANSFERS
page_header.title: Private Money to Family & Friends
page_header.description: Payment links for personal transfers. Share a link via any messaging app. Recipient claims without wallet exposure.

paragraphs: Sending money to a friend means they see your entire wallet. Family members can track your spending. Cross-border transfers create permanent public records.
Create a payment link for any amount. Share it through WhatsApp, Telegram, SMS, or email. The recipient clicks the link and claims the money to their wallet. No apps required, no balance exposure.
Perfect for splitting dinner bills, rent payments, birthday gifts, emergency transfers, or any personal transaction where privacy matters.

items.title: Create Payment Link
items.description: Set the amount and generate a shareable link. Funds go into escrow immediately.

items.title: Share via Any Channel
items.description: Send the link through any messaging app, email, or social platform.

items.title: Recipient Claims
items.description: Recipient clicks link, connects wallet, and claims the money. No app installation required.

items.title: No Public Trace
items.description: Transaction completes with no public connection between sender and recipient wallets.

items.title: Family Privacy
items.description: Send money without exposing your balance. Perfect for family support or allowances.

items.title: Cross-Border Ready
items.description: USDC on Solana works globally. Send money anywhere instantly with low fees.

items.title: No App Required
items.description: Recipient just needs a browser and a wallet. Works on any device, any platform.
